description: Drape a 2D trail alignment onto a 3D topographic surface in TopoCal using the project file 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\trail_drape_start.top'. This file contains raw survey points for a site in the Colorado foothills and a 2D polyline representing a proposed trail. Generate a triangulated Digital Terrain Model (MDT/TIN) from the survey points and project the 2D trail polyline onto the active terrain surface to assign it real Z-elevations. Export the resulting 3D polyline drawing to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\trail_3D.dxf'.
